questionHtml: The graph also shows the displacement of two particles, P and Q, in the medium at t = 0. State and explain which particle has the larger magnitude of acceleration at t = 0.
markschemeHtml:
Q ✔
acceleration is proportional to displacement «and Q has larger displacement» ✔

meta.title: The graph also shows the displacement of two particles, P and Q, in the medium at t = 0. State and explain which particle has the larger magnitude of acceleration at t = 0.
